title: 211INFO CHILD CARE - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO CHILD CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Child Care Referral Specialists offer specialized information about child care and referrals to child care providers and preschools. Specialists can also provide detailed information on Employment-Related Day Care (ERDC). Eligibility: Parents and caregivers of children up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-8pm Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Select Child Care Option 211 Text Short Code 898211 Text the word 'children' Text Short Code 898211 Text the word 'ninos' Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call 211 and select the Child Care option. If calling after hours or when specialists are not available, leave a voicemail for a callback. Text and email options are also available. FEES: None for referrals LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Administrative Entities * Child Care Workers Child and Adult Care Food Programs Child Care Complaints Child Care Expense Assistance Child Care Expense Assistance * Child Care Issues Child Care Expense Assistance * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Child Care Expense Assistance * College/University Students Child Care Expense Assistance * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Child Care Expense Assistance * Foster Children Child Care Expense Assistance * Foster Families Child Care Expense Assistance * Infants/Toddlers Child Care Expense Assistance * Native American Community Child Care Expense Assistance * Preschool Age Children Child Care Mental Health Consultation Programs Child Care Provider Recruitment Child Care Provider Referrals Child Care Provider Training Child Care Provider Training * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Child Care Providers Child Care Providers * COVID-19 Early Head Start Early Head Start * Migrants Early Head Start * Native American Community Facility Licensing * Child Care Issues Head Start Head Start * Migrants Head Start * Native American Community Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Child Care Issues Preschool Referral Programs Preschools Preschools * Disabilities Issues Preschools * Migrants Specialized Information and Referral * Child Care Issues Student Disability Services * Child Care Issues Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Child Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES -
